subject: Biology
title: What Is an Ecosystem?
description: A quick, practical guide to What Is an Ecosystem?.

hook.text: A pond, a forest, and a coral reef look nothing alike—but they all follow the same rules.

buildup.text: An ecosystem is a community of living things interacting with their non-living environment.

discovery.text: Energy flows through ecosystems and nutrients cycle within them, connecting everything.

twist.text: Remove one species and the ripple effects can transform the entire system.

climax.text: From a tiny puddle to the Amazon rainforest, ecosystems sustain all life on Earth.

quiz.question: What two things connect all parts of an ecosystem?
